Premise: A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide.. Setting: Port authority archives and salt catacombs. Threat presence: The Salt Regent. Recurring motifs: salt crowns, wet ledgers, cargo seals. Design portrait of antagonist The Salt Regent with archetype SEDUCTIVE_CORRUPTER, speech style "Elegant, flattering, and predatory.", and motifs salt crowns, wet ledgers, cargo seals.. Subgenre: occult conspiracy. Tone: CINEMATIC. Immediate scene brief: Crown of Salt - Villain Portrait. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Create a realistic portrait with wardrobe, posture, facial tension, and environmental context that reveal personality and danger. Avoid floating-head composition. Frame as a prestige horror still, not concept art.

assets.title: Crown of Salt - Villain Voice Profile
assets.prompt_used: This is Villain. A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide. Work the case in order: secure brine-sealed manifest, confirm the scene at port authority archives and salt catacombs, and do not let The Salt Regent choose the pace. Trust the evidence before you trust the performance.
